name: Apple-Apricot Strudel
recipeInstructions:
1. Unfold 1-2 phyllo leaves, depending on desired thickness. Place the leaves on a damp cloth to prevent drying while working.
2. Melt butter in the microwave for 30 seconds.
3. Brush the first leaf with melted butter. Place the second leaf on top of the first and brush it with butter, then sprinkle bread crumbs evenly over it.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together chopped apples, sugar, salt, raisins, dried apricots, almonds, lemon zest, lemon juice, and cinnamon.
5. Spread half of this mixture along the edge of the dough nearest to you in one strip.
6. Roll the dough into a jelly-roll shape. Place the first strudel roll in a buttered 9-inch baking dish, brushing the top lightly with melted butter, sugar, and cinnamon.
7. Prepare the other two leaves using the remaining ingredients.
8. Microwave time: 8-10½ minutes. Conventional range time: 35 minutes at 375°F.
